flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Florida Career College-Miami fell 47% between 2006 and 2009 (77.0% → 40.9%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Florida Career College-Miami rose 28% between 2006 and 2009 ($6.6k → $8.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Florida Career College-Miami rose 25% between 2006 and 2009 ($13.3k → $16.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Florida Career College-Miami rose 25% between 2006 and 2009 ($13.3k → $16.6k).
